insights.title: Primary Concern: App Experience
insights.observation: App Experience is the most mentioned theme with 55 mentions across 3 sentiment categories.
insights.user_need: Users need resolution for this recurring issue to maintain trust in the platform.
insights.root_cause: The high frequency of app experience reports suggests systemic issues in the current process.
insights.opportunity: Addressing this systematically could significantly improve user satisfaction and reduce churn.
insights.implication: This should be prioritized in the product roadmap as it directly impacts user retention.

insights.title: Secondary Concern: Delivery Issues
insights.observation: Delivery Issues appears 54 times, indicating it's a significant pain point.
insights.user_need: Users expect reliable resolution for these issues.
insights.root_cause: Process gaps in delivery issues handling.
insights.opportunity: Streamlining this area could differentiate from competitors.
insights.implication: Invest in automation or better processes for this area.

insights.title: Negative Sentiment Dominance
insights.user_need: Users are frustrated and need tangible improvements.
insights.root_cause: Multiple unresolved issues across delivery, quality, and support.
insights.opportunity: Turning negative experiences into positive ones through proactive outreach.
insights.implication: Urgent intervention needed to prevent further reputation damage.
